supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, RNA was isolated from the cells and ANGPTL3 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS3492_MGB was used to measure mRNA levels. ANGPTL3 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis/Isis patent. In vitro Hep3B screen of ~3000-5000 MOE/cET gapmers uses real-time PCR normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN (primer probe set RTS3492_MGB). In vivo mouse liver experiments in the same patent variously use RIBOGREEN/total RNA or cyclophilin; the in vitro Hep3B data (the basis for this dataset) is RIBOGREEN/total RNA.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 48 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells and MSH3 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human MSH3 primer probe set RTS40982 was used to measure RNA levels as described above. MSH3 levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent 'Compounds and Methods for Reducing MSH3 Expression'. All in vitro screens use real-time RTPCR with primer probe set RTS40982 (and HTS7138), normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Note: a DIFFERENT (non-Ionis) MSH3 patent family uses GUSB/beta-glucuronidase, but this specific patent uses total RNA/RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells and NLRP3 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. NLRP3 RNA levels were measured by human primer-probe set RTS37509 (described herein above). ... NLRP3 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis patent. THP-1 in vitro screens use real-time RTPCR with primer probe set RTS37509, normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN (16 RIBOGREEN normalization statements vs 2 GAPDH in the whole document). Predominant and THP-1-specific basis is total RNA/RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, HSD17B13 RNA levels were measured as previously described using the Human HSD17B13 primer-probe set RTS43553. HSD17B13 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Ionis patent. HepaRG in vitro screens use real-time RTPCR with primer probe set RTS43553. Predominant normalizer is total RNA/RIBOGREEN (6 of 8 HepaRG experiment blocks). SECONDARY basis: 2 HepaRG blocks normalize instead to GAPDH ('HSD17B13 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by human GAPDH' / 'normalized to total GAPDH content'). No ACTB used. Mixed normalization within the patent.
